name: acceptance-gate
description: Codex-native acceptance gate for AI-generated features with contracts, evals, evidence, decision cards, gate decision skills (approve/signoff), a gate metrics report, runtime hooks, CI re-checks, and a coverage-scan skill (morphological-scan) feeding the contract Coverage section, and a Gate-1 gap-probe block (clean-context critique, fail-visible flags).

interface.longDescription: Turn feature requests into acceptance contracts, generate evals, render decision artifacts, verify machine evidence, and block unsupported PASS verdicts with Codex lifecycle hooks plus CI re-checks.
defaultPrompt: Create an acceptance contract and evals for this feature.
Verify this feature with evidence-backed acceptance gates.
